---
title: function-length
description: "Limit function statements and lines."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🔵 `note`

Limit function statements and lines. Strider default: 50 statements; 75 lines.

## Bad

```go
func run() { /* more than 50 statements or 75 lines */ }
```

## Good

```go
func run() { load(); process(); save() }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only function-length`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
